audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at lines 155-157 directly enforces `order.buyAmount >= minBuyAmount`, where `minBuyAmount` is freshly computed via `_getAssetOutAmount` on every call using current chain state (no caching). The check is unconditional on the only validation path — no branch can skip it — and `elapsedTime > auctionDuration` is pre-rejected at line 150-152, keeping price-curve inputs bounded.
